name: Cipher + Aglaea, Caught in a Predicament || Honkai: Star Rail
description:
“I’ve got a notion: there’s no emotion. She’s just an auto-response to the commotion. She’s got no future. She’s just a loser. There are no meds to pull her head out of this stupor.”

I’ve like, never shipped Ciphlaea before and sorta(?) dislike it? But I’m kinda warming up to it, after researching a little and finding out their relationship wasn’t that of mother and daughter. I saw this image and how hot it was, and its history from there.

If you don’t like the ship and just came here to be a bitch abt it, genuinely just leave gng 🥀✌️

Lesbians amirite?

Nah they’re bi in this. Gotta keep up the AnyPOV.

Credit to HearthFaith for the lorebooks, as always.


MISFIT’S TAVERN! (Link is embedded)

I am affiliated with Misfit’s Tavern! Please join, it’s full of really fun and welcoming people! I have my own personal channel where all news of my bots are. If you want to stay updated on me, that’s where you’d want to go!

I might do a 12 days of Christmas thing, but probably not. I just don’t have the time to make 12 bots, and I’d rather not just recycle characters I’ve already made.

Next bot is prob Crusch Karsten, then all 5 Royal Selection Candidates in one.
